channel.title: +Cochran Gregory on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Cochran Gregory on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Hidden Games
item.description: Source: here. Hidden Games Diversity There is no single human nature. This is obvious enough – people vary strongly in their psychology and behavior. The differences show up early in life and don’t seem to be affected much by parental rearing style. It would be nice to understand more about the ultimate causes of variation in human personality, partly because of practical implications, mostly because we find ourselves very interesting.
